tif

Class TifParser

  • java.lang.Object
    • common.AbstractImageParser
      • tif.TifParser

  • public class TifParser
extends AbstractImageParser
    A concrete implementation of AbstractImageParser for extracting metadata from TIFF files.

    This parser interprets the 8-byte TIFF header, including byte order (either big-endian MM or little-endian II), magic number 0x002A, and initial IFD offset and traverses the linked list of Image File Directories (IFDs). It supports standard tags, custom extensions, and nested sub-directories such as EXIF.

    Since:
    13 August 2025
    Version:
    1.0
    Author:
    Trevor Maggs
    See Also:
    TIFF 6.0 Specification

    • Constructor Detail

      • TifParser

        public TifParser(java.nio.file.Path fpath)
          throws java.io.IOException
        Creates an instance intended for parsing the specified TIFF image file.
        Parameters:
        fpath - the path to the TIFF file
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if the file is not a regular type or does not exist

      • TifParser

        public TifParser(java.lang.String file)
          throws java.io.IOException
        Creates an instance for parsing the specified TIFF image file.
        Parameters:
        file - the path to the TIFF file
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if an I/O error occurs

    • Method Detail

      • parseTiffMetadataFromBytes

        public static TifMetadata parseTiffMetadataFromBytes(byte[] payload)
        Parses TIFF metadata from a byte array, assuming it is a valid TIFF or EXIF payload, including the 8-byte header length.

        Optimised for cases where TIFF data, particularly an embedded EXIF segment, is already present in memory. This avoids redundant disk I/O.

        Parameters:
        payload - the byte array containing TIFF-formatted data
        Returns:
        a TifMetadata object, it guarantees non-null even if parsing fails

      • readMetadata

        public boolean readMetadata()
                     throws java.io.IOException
        Parses TIFF and XMP metadata from the image file.

        Performs a reverse traversal of IFDs to honour the "last-one-wins" XMP strategy. This ensures that the most recently encountered IFD_XML_PACKET takes precedence in the final metadata container.

        Specified by:
        readMetadata in class AbstractImageParser
        Returns:
        true if metadata was successfully populated
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if data corruption or I/O errors occur during traversal

      • getMetadata

        public Metadata<DirectoryIFD> getMetadata()
        Retrieves the extracted metadata, or a safe fallback if unavailable.
        Specified by:
        getMetadata in class AbstractImageParser
        Returns:
        a TifMetadata object containing the extracted IFDs, or a new empty TifMetadata object if parsing has not occurred

      • getImageFormat

        public DigitalSignature getImageFormat()
        Returns the detected TIFF format.
        Specified by:
        getImageFormat in class AbstractImageParser
        Returns:
        a DigitalSignature enum class

      • formatDiagnosticString

        public java.lang.String formatDiagnosticString()
        Generates a human-readable diagnostic string containing metadata segment details.

        Returns:
        a formatted string suitable for diagnostics, logging, or inspection
